review_notes: Haricot blanc->Pleurote. Highest score in batch (0.790). HIGH->MODERATE level gain. Cross-type mannitol swap; instruction_fr must specify side-dish/accompaniment context. Auto-eligible, no second review required.

Substantive review complete; research supports approval; deferred pending independent second reviewer. Original: Lentille verte->Haricot rouge. Small mannitol burden improvement within legume family (4.167->3.750). Both HIGH. Culinary overlap good. Marginal clinical gain but valid.

Poire->Nectarine. Stone fruit swap, culinarily coherent. FLAG: pear (rank 31) mannitol burden ratio 20.200 is anomalous - polyol_wave01 measured only sorbitol for this rank. Mannitol signal likely from global fallback default. Approve but add rank 31 to Phase 2 mannitol measurement expansion queue.

HARD REJECT. auto_eligible=FALSE. GOS burden identical (1.500->1.500) - zero improvement. Conservative gate fails: to_burden_ratio is not less than from_burden_ratio. Score 0.490 below 0.500 floor. No clinical justification for this swap.
